td.div: English: vector version of Judo white belt.png

div.div: This vector image was created with another SVG tool.

tr.td: This is a retouched picture, which means that it has been digitally altered from its original version. Modifications: vectorized image to facilitate smoother scaling. The original can be viewed here: Judo white belt.PNG: . Modifications made by Jdcollins13.

share alike – If you remix, transform, or build upon the material, you must distribute your contributions under the same or compatible license as the original.
